falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,000 (key resistance level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would indicate strong bullish momentum, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate aggressive buying pressure, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a trend reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average (golden cross) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical indicator would confirm a bullish trend, directly contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and bottom pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
